{{Quote|Leave this place!|Numerous Noghri to Jaden Korr on Yalara|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mission to Yalara''' was carried out by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaden Korr]] for the [[New Jedi Order]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].

==Mission==
===Background===
[[Jedi historian]] [[Tionne Solusar|Tionne]] learned of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yalara]] via a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]]. The planet was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a primitive [[Species/Legends|species]] and was hidden by a planetary [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]], established [[Standard year/Legends|years]] ago by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Broden Kel Verdox]]. After learning that others were possibly aware of the planet, the [[New Jedi Order]] sent Jaden Korr to either disable it for future use, or destroy it rather than let it fall into the wrong hands. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] heavily opinionated that it would be better to destroy the device.

===The mission===
[[File:Korr_nohgri.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Jaden Korr confronts the Noghri.]]
After arriving at the massive generator complex for the cloaking device, Korr was unexpectedly ambushed by [[Noghri Death Commando]]s, whom he defeated. As he explored further, he discovered that the [[Imperial Remnant]] and the [[Disciples of Ragnos]] forces were present as well, and they too were fighting the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] for the cloaking device. Korr decided it was better to destroy the device. Defeating both sides, Korr made his way up the complex by riding the air currents of the complex's ventilation fans. Once at the top, Korr dueled more [[New Reborn]] and Noghri before destroying the cloaking device by setting explosive charges.

===Aftermath===
After returning to the [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]], Skywalker suspected that [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who enslaved many of the Noghri species and employed them as [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] and bodyguards, had ordered his Noghri Commandos to [[Mission to Yalara (Galactic Empire)|exterminate]] the Yalarans and guard the cloaking device. The remaining Noghri on Yalara were returned to their homeworld [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
